# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web-container
        image: <your-web-image>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached-container
        image: memcached:1.5
        ports:
        - containerPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker-container
        image: <your-worker-image>
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached-app
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer
